Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class Quantifier

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Quantifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, Sorted, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class Quantifier extends AbstractSortedOperator
The two objects of this class represent the universal and the existential quantifier, respectively.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Quantifier
    ALL
    the usual 'forall' operator 'all' (be A a formula then 'all x.A' is true if and only if for all elements d of the universe A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true
    static final Name
    ALL_NAME
     
    static final Quantifier
    EX
    the usual 'exists' operator 'ex' (be A a formula then 'ex x.A' is true if and only if there is at least one elements d of the universe such that A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true
    static final Name
    EX_NAME

    • ALL

      public static final Quantifier ALL
      the usual 'forall' operator 'all' (be A a formula then 'all x.A' is true if and only if for all elements d of the universe A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true

    • EX

      public static final Quantifier EX
      the usual 'exists' operator 'ex' (be A a formula then 'ex x.A' is true if and only if there is at least one elements d of the universe such that A{x<-d} (x substituted with d) is true

    • validTopLevelException

      public void validTopLevelException(Term term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognise
